---
title: Lab solutions
---

Lab worksheets with answers included.

- [Lab 02 -- Statistical programming](solutions/labs/Lab02.html)
- [Lab 03 -- Exploring and visualising data](solutions/labs/Lab03.html)
- [Lab 04 -- Central limit theorem](solutions/labs/Lab04.html)
- [Lab 05 -- Hypothesis testing](solutions/labs/Lab05.html)
- [Lab 06 -- Two-sample *t*-test](solutions/labs/Lab06.html)
- [Lab 07 -- Non-parametric tests & Chi-squared tests](solutions/labs/Lab07.html)
- [Lab 09 -- Describing relationships](solutions/labs/Lab09.html)
- [Lab 10 -- Linear functions](solutions/labs/Lab10.html)
- [Lab 11 -- Multiple Linear Regression](solutions/labs/Lab11.html)
- [Lab 12 -- Non-linear models](solutions/labs/Lab12.html)
